name: rockstarr-ops
description: Rockstarr AI sales-ops plugin. Tool-agnostic — every CRM, task system, meeting recorder, calendar, email platform, deliverability tool, and LinkedIn outreach tool is named in stack.md at install. Covers daily call prep, Call 1 and Call 2 prep, client catch-ups, old-lead audits, lead reengagement, post-call transcript processing, and recurring deliverability tests. Customer-facing drafts route through rockstarr-reply; CRM writes through the active rockstarr-ops-bot.
